'''Risi Lenoan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] and the [[Kuat sector/Legends|Kuat sector]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Lenoan was present at the unveiling ceremony of the [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|''Aethersprite''-class interceptor]] at the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], where she symbolically cut a tether tied to the prototype's landing gear. During the test run, the [[Senator/Legends|senator]] lauded its performance, alongside [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and the project's Lead Engineer, [[Walex Blissex/Legends|Walex Blissex]].<ref name="HNN" />

She was removed from office by the Kuati nobility when it was discovered she might have pilfered Kuat Drive Yards funding. Lenoan was replaced by [[Giddean Danu/Legends|Giddean Danu]] at the suggestion of [[Onara Kuat]].<ref name="DB" />

==Appearances==
